title: Pan-Seared Shrimp with Garlic Aioli
description: A rich and indulgent Spanish-inspired dish, pan-seared to perfection and served with a side of creamy garlic aioli. This decadent recipe is sure to become a new favorite.
instructions: Heat the butter and olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the shrimp and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, until pink and cooked through.
Transfer the shrimp to a plate and cover with foil to keep warm.
Reduce the heat to medium and add the al ajillo to the skillet.
Cook for 1-2 minutes, until the garlic aioli is heated through.
Serve the shrimp with the garlic aioli spooned over the top.
Garnish with parsley and serve with lemon wedges on the side.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
